title: What Is a Neuron?
negative_global: blur, distortion, watermark, text overlay, morphing faces, extra limbs, deformed hands, compression artifacts, flickering, flat lighting

scenes.visual: Extreme wide shot of vast bioluminescent neural network stretching to infinity, volumetric cyan backlight, warm amber key light, from below
scenes.audio_note: Music from beat 1 — single low synth pad. Narration intimate, close-mic.

scenes.dialogue: Each one does something embarrassingly simple.
scenes.visual: Extreme close-up macro of a single luminous neuron node pulsing with soft light, warm practical light emanating from the neuron itself, cool ambient fill, staticwith subtle depth-of-field breathing
scenes.audio_note: Pause 0.5s after 'simple' — let it land. SFX: subtle organic pulse on the neuron glow.

scenes.dialogue: But together, they create everything you have ever experienced.
scenes.visual: Medium shot pulling back from single neuron to reveal thousands firing in cascading waves of light, bioluminescent rim light, deep volumetric fog creating god rays
scenes.audio_note: Music adds rhythm element. Voice builds energy. SFX: cascading sparkle as neurons fire in sequence.
scenes.editorial: KULESHOV: single neuron (intimate) → vast network (awe). The scale shift creates the emotion.

scenes.dialogue: We figured out how to copy this trick. Not perfectly. Not biologically. But mathematically. And it changed everything.
scenes.visual: Wide overhead shot looking down into a crystalline geometric structure — an artificial neural network rendered as architectural glass and light, cool blue-white key light, reflecting through geometric facets with warm amber accents, slow orbital arc camera circling the structure, clean and mathematical
scenes.audio_note: Voice builds across the sentence. Music swells on 'changed everything.' Brief 0.3s silence after.
scenes.editorial: EISENSTEIN INTELLECTUAL MONTAGE: biological network (prev scene) → geometric structure (this scene). Brain builds: nature inspired mathematics.

scenes.dialogue: An artificial neuron takes in numbers. Multiplies each by a weight — a score that says how important this input is. Adds them all up. And then a tiny function decides: fire, or stay quiet.
scenes.motion_graphic: Manim/Remotion animated diagram building left-to-right: input arrows flowing in → multiply symbols with weight values appearing (spring animation, staggered) → summation node collecting streams → activation function curve drawing itself → output arrow firing with glow. Clean dark background, teal accent lines, white text labels. Progressive reveal synced to narration phrases.
scenes.audio_note: Music drops to minimal pad. Voice is clear teaching mode. SFX: each element gets its sound — soft 'tick' for inputs, 'whoosh' for multiply, 'thud' for summation, 'sparkle' for activation firing.

scenes.dialogue: That is it. That is the entire secret.
scenes.visual: Close-up of a single water droplet falling in slow motion onto a still surface, creating perfect concentric ripples, warm golden backlight, catching the droplet edge with rim lightwith
scenes.audio_note: DROP ALL MUSIC for 0.5s before 'That is it.' Let the silence create weight. SFX: single water drop impact, then ripple spreading. Music returns softly.
scenes.editorial: VISUAL METAPHOR: water droplet = simplicity. Ripples = emergent complexity. Concrete before abstract (Mayer).

scenes.dialogue: One neuron draws a single line through data. Useless on its own. But stack thousands in layers — and watch what happens.
scenes.visual: Wide shot of a single glowing line cutting through darkness, camera pulls back to reveal thousands of parallel lines forming a grid, grid folds into a three-dimensional lattice structure of light, cool teal volumetric light, warm amber node points, smooth
scenes.audio_note: Music builds — add bass pulse, then rhythm, then melody as layers stack. Voice accelerates with energy. SFX: layering sounds, each new layer adds a harmonic.

scenes.dialogue: The first layer learns edges. The second combines edges into shapes. The third recognizes faces. Complexity emerges from simplicity. That is the magic of neural networks.
scenes.visual: Extreme close-up of abstract edge patterns sharpening into geometric shapes, shapes assembling into a recognizable human face emerging from pure mathematics — face resolves from wireframe to photorealistic in a single continuous shot, dramatic split lighting — cool analytical teal, from left, warm human amber, from right as the face emerges
scenes.audio_note: THIS IS THE PEAK. Music at full force when face resolves. 0.7s SILENCE before 'That is the magic.' Then voice drops half a register — intimate, revelatory. Impact SFX on the recognition moment.
scenes.editorial: EISENSTEIN OVERTONAL MONTAGE: metric (accelerating cuts during edge→shape→face), rhythmic (matching visual complexity), tonal (cool→warm as abstract→human). The cut rhythm + color shift + music swell all peak simultaneously.

scenes.dialogue: When you talk to an AI, you are sending signals through billions of these neurons, arranged in layers so deep they would fill a skyscraper.
scenes.visual: Extreme wide shot looking up at a vast vertical tower of interconnected light networks stretching beyond frame — architectural and cosmic simultaneously, volumetric fog with cool teal ambient, warm amber node clusters, creating depth separation, slow tilt upward that never reaches the top
scenes.audio_note: Music wide and spacious — reverb opens up. Voice has awe in it. SFX: deep resonant hum of the structure, subtle electrical crackle.

scenes.dialogue: Each one does its tiny job. And somehow — understanding emerges. That is what a neuron teaches us. Simplicity, stacked deep enough, becomes intelligence.
scenes.visual: Medium close-up of a single neuron node glowing warmly, camera slowly pulling back to show it nested within a vast but gentle constellation of others — warm and peaceful, not overwhelming, warm golden key light, dominant now with soft cool fill, gentle
scenes.audio_note: Music resolving — final chord progression. Voice intimate, almost whispered on the last line. 2s silence after final word before outro. SFX: none — let voice and music carry it.

scenes.motion_graphic: Remotion: warm neural constellation slowly dissolves into starfield. 'Next: How Neurons Learn' fades in with spring animation (KineticText component). 'likeone.ai' below in smaller type. Warm amber palette, gentle particle overlay.
scenes.audio_note: Music fades to silence over 3s. Single soft tone resolves. Ambient room tone holds briefly, then silence.
